Test_Steps:
1.Enter 10 in "First number" field
2.Enter 5 in "Second number" field
3. Choose operation as "Add"
4.Choose "Integer only" option
5. Click "Calculate" button

Test_Scenario: Verify Addition Operation should not work if one of the input field is a string when "Integer only" option is not selected
Test_Steps:
1.Enter 10 in "First number" field
2.Enter "Lobo" in "Second number" field
3. Choose operation as "Add"
4. Do not Choose "Integer only" option
5. Click "Calculate" button
Expected_Result: Error message saying one of the field is not a number
